title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Shiprocket Capital India

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Shiprocket Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Shiprocket Capital India family as a Category Manager in Ludhiana. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Shiprocket Capital India:
Shiprocket Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shiprocket Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
